text: * Database Services: Athena, AzureSQL, BigQuery, Clickhouse, Databricks, Datalake, DB2, DeltaLake, Domo Database, Druid, DynamoDB, Glue, Hive, Impala, MariaDB, MongoDB, MSSQL, MySQL, Oracle, PinotDB, Postgres, Presto, Redshift, Salesforce, SAP Hana, SingleStore, Snowflake, SQlite, Trino, and Vertica. * Dashboard Services: Domo Dashboard, Looker, Metabase, Mode, PowerBI, Qlik Sense, QuickSight, Redash, Superset, and Tableau. « Messaging Services: Kafka, Kinesis, and Redpanda. * Pipeline Services: Airbyte, Airflow, Dagster, Databricks Pipeline, Domo Pipeline, Fivetran, Glue Pipeline, NiFi, and Spline. * ML Model Services: MLflow, and Sagemaker. * Storage Service: Amazon S3 * Metadata Services: Amundsen, and Atlas
